title: Tweaking some stuff
description: This mod adds some minor additions to the game, such as crafting tweaks and new villager trades.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10834b9224a8bbc77af1ee6387e2a5b757224890.png)
This mod adds some minor additions to the game, such as crafting tweaks and new villager trades.

The mod currently adds 14 new Crafting recipes, 1 new potion, changes to conduit power, 2 Advancements and 17 new Wandering Trader trades.
(_Recipes are shown in the gallery_)

~~New potion of decay~~ (Currently removed)

Conduit power now gives dolphins grace

New Party and Goated with the sauce Advancement

![New advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64aba63ca223986cffa8ad05ce6e598194543034.png)
